title: Battle of Kattada
content:
{{Top|ffa|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Raid over Corulag]]According to ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] is assigned by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] after a Rebel [[raid over Corulag]]. Since Antilles is in [[Commander/Legends|command]] of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] during the battle of [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]], the [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] operation must happen before it. |conc=[[Subjugation of Ralltiir]][[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] |next=[[Battle of Toprawa]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |image=[[File:LeiaAtlas.jpg]] |name=Battle of Kattada |conflict=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Operation Skyhook]] |date=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]The zero point between years in the Galactic Standard Calendar falls between the second and third months of the [[Great ReSynchronization]] year, or the start of 35:3 in the case of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. As this battle falls in 35:2, it occurs in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. (35:2 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]])''[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]'' places the Subjugation of Ralltiir in 35:2 GrS. |place=[[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]] |result=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] victory[[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]] |side1=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] *[[Mia Ikova]]† *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] |commanders2=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]]† *[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Spilik]]† |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] **[[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] *[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *[[Kattadan Guard|Kattadan troops]] |forces2=*1 [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] *[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blasters]] *[[Speeder bike/Legends|Speeder bikes]] {{C|stuck in [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] during the battle}} |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Mia Ikova *Some Rebel and Kattadan [[Troop/Legends|troops]] |casual2=*Karg *Spilik *The ''Sentinel''-class [[Landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] *Most of the Imperial force |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|You think this will save you, Princess? This display of resistance only delays the inevitable—and seals your fate.|Imperial Commander Karg|}} The '''Battle of Kattada''', also identified as a '''firefight on Kattada''', took place in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and was fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada's]] main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Haleoda]]. Shortly after arriving on Kattada, Rebel-allied [[Rebel trooper/Legends|crew members]] of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] were confronted by an Imperial force under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Spilik]]. The Imperials had been given orders to arrest the crew of the ''Tantive IV'', among them [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], if the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] landed on any other planet than Organa's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. After an Imperial attempt to arrest Organa, and the Kattadan leader [[Mia Ikova]] because she aided Organa, left Ikova wounded, Rebel [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] had the turrets of the ''Tantive IV'' fire upon the Imperials. This crippled the Imperial's [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]], and destroyed the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle's]] [[Communications array/Legends|communications]]. Forced to confront the stranded Imperials, the crew members and [[Kattadan Guard|Kattada's troopers]] [[Ground warfare/Legends|attacked]] after a short reprive in the fighting. The Rebels triumphed after they managed to breach the defenses that the Imperials had created around the shuttle. The fighting was costly for both sides, with Ikova succumbing to her wounds and both [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] [[Death/Legends|dying]]. In the end, Organa's true colors were not revealed to the Empire. ==Prelude== {{Quote|So Leia, what service are you seeking? Delivery, or receipt?''"
"''You do get to the point, don't you? Very well. I have a shipment of supplies that I need delivered… to the Rebels on Ralltiir.|Kattadan leader Mia Ikova and Princess Organa|}} In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], key Alliance member [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] attempted to transport combat-related [[Medic/Legends|medical]] supplies to the Rebels on the Imperial-[[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugated]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] utilizing the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]. That trip occurred during [[Operation Skyhook]], a Rebel project to obtain the [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] for the Empire's massive [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] known as the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] in order to destroy it. During the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} stay on the world, the crew members of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]], all loyal to the Alliance, picked up [[Basso]], a wounded Rebel [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who had made it past the Imperial presence on Ralltiir to get in contact with Organa and deliver information [[Hypno-imprinting|hypno-imprinted]] into his memory, which was only accessible with medical equipment not held aboard Organa's corvette. To treat his wounds, the crew members of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] put Basso in a healing [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]]. However, Organa was unable to deliver the medical supplies to the Rebels after the Imperials whom Basso had evaded, led by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Tion (Lord)/Legends|Tion]], threatened to search the ''Tantive IV'' for anything that might connect Organa to the Rebel cause. Organa prevented Tion from searching the ship, and the corvette left Ralltiir, its mission a failure. [[File:Imperials_arrive.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Imperials arrive on Kattada.]] Hoping to find some other way to get the medical supplies to Ralltiir, Organa and the crew of the ''Tantive IV'' traveled to the world of [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]], where they landed in the biggest [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], [[Haleoda]]. Organa then met with [[Mia Ikova]], the elected leader of Haleoda, in private to ask if Kattadan [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] could take the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} medical supplies to Ralltiir. Ikova agreed, and the supplies were unloaded. Meanwhile, an Imperial landing force led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Spilik]] rushed to intercept Organa and the rest of the corvette crew upon orders from [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The Dark Lord wished to detain Organa and the others if they traveled to any world besides Organa's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. Just as Organa and the crew members were ready to depart Kattada to return to Alderaan, one of the [[Kattadan Guard|Kattadan soldiers]] warned Organa and Ivoka of an approaching Imperial [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]], which contained the Imperial landing force. After the vessel touched down next to the ''Tantive IV'', the Imperials attempted to detain Organa and the others. Although [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] of the ''Tantive IV'' had the crew members and [[Rebel trooper/Legends|troopers]] on the corvette arm themselves with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and man the ship's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] turrets, Organa sought to end the confrontation peacefully. ==The battle== ===Initial engagement=== {{Quote|You men, stop wasting your fire on that ship! Your blasters can't penetrate its hull. Get on board! Power up the shields and the guns! Get ready to launch the missiles.|Lieutenant Spilik|}} Organa's ideas of a peaceful solution were destroyed when the Imperials attempted to arrest Ikova alongside the members of the ''Tantive IV'' for aiding the Princess. Two Kattadan guards stepped forward to help their mistress, and the Imperials [[Ground warfare/Legends|fired]] a blaster volley, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the two guards and wounding Ikova. Organa, who would have gone peacefully with the Imperials had Ikova not been shot, ordered the members of the corvette to open fire on the Imperials with the corvette's turrets. The attack forced the Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] to fall back to their ship, although Karg stood firm and confronted Organa at [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blasterpoint]] as she was tending to Ikova. Antilles had one of the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} turrets shoot Karg, wounding Karg severely, and saving Organa from death. [[File:Battle_of_Kattada.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} turrets open fire upon the Imperials.]] On the Imperial side of the battlefield, Spilik prevented his [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] from firing on the attacking corvette, as the Imperial's blaster fire would not damage the ship. Instead, the Lieutenant ordered his men to get aboard the [[Landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] and prepare guns and [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] for action. Meanwhile, upon Organa's insistence, both Karg and Ikova were brought aboard the ''Tantive IV'' to have their wounds tended in the [[Medical bay/Legends|medical bay]]. Antilles reported that the fight so far had cost them no casualties, but he warned the Princess of the damage that could be done if the Imperials contacted their [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] command. The possibility convinced Organa to grant Antilles permission to turn the turrets of the corvette onto the ''Sentinel''-class [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle's]] [[Communications array/Legends|communications array]] and landing gear, leaving the shuttle crippled and the Imperials unable to call for backup. However, the [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] of the shuttle were still operational, and Spilik, the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] in charge at that point, ordered for them to be brought to full strength. Meanwhile, Organa overruled Antilles' decision to finish off the Imperials and instead had the ''Tantive IV'' move away from the danger of the battlefield so they could tend to Ikova's wounds. The corvette landed a short distance from the fighting. ===Lull in combat and ground assault=== {{Quote|It's started! Don't wait for targets! Open fire!|An Imperial scout trooper|}} On board the grounded corvette, Organa, alongside [[Mia Ikova's father]] and the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} medical crew, witnessed Ikova make her last wish that the supplies would get to Ralltiir before she died from her wound. After accusing Organa of killing him, Karg too died from his injuries. Back at the battle site, the Imperials under Spilik dug in, removing panels in the landing pad to create trenches, as well as preparing their [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]]-class [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blasters]] for battle. The shields of the landing craft were at full strength as well, though the [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] in the ship could not be accessed, as the Imperials could not pry the hatch open. A [[Spilik's aide|scout trooper]] reported the situation to Spilik, who wondered why their enemies had let them hole up and refrained from attacking right away. On the ''Tantive IV'', Organa consulted with Basso, who had recovered from his wounds from Ralltiir, on the possibility of a ground assault against the Imperial positions. Though Organa at first did not want to pursue such a course of action as it would be too costly, Basso convinced her that there was no other way. By then, [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial High Command]] had listed the patrol to Kattada overdue, and the Imperial forces were waiting for another patrol ship to arrive by [[Standard day/Legends|midday]]. [[File:BattleofKattada2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Rebel ground assault]] Back at the battlefield, the Kattadans, along with the crew members and troopers of the ''Tantive IV'', resumed the battle against their adversaries. Enemy blaster fire against the Imperials caused them to respond with their own, exposing their position. This allowed the Rebel allied forces to thin the ranks of the Imperials with a [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] volley. However, before the Imperials could target and take out the snipers, the Rebel forces charged the Imperial position, although others, including Organa and Antilles, stayed behind. In the end, Organa's forces overwhelmed those of Spilik, and the Lieutenant himself perished in the battle, with only a handful of Imperial troops surviving to surrender. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Our people will have the Imperial ship dismantled, and all traces of the battle hidden before another patrol arrives. Not a word of what transpired here will pass anyone's lips.|A Kattadan|}} Because the Rebel-allied forces prevented the Imperials on Kattada from contacting their superiors, the Empire failed to gain solid proof that Organa was associated with the Rebel cause. Following the battle, the Kattadans assured the crew of the ''Tantive IV'' that the Imperial landing craft would be dismantled and all other evidence of the battle tucked out of sight before another Imperial patrol arrived. Organa and the others from the ''Tantive IV'' left for Alderaan in hopes of having the [[Doctor/Legends|doctors]] on Organa's homeworld unlock the information stored in Basso's memory. After the Rebels discovered the existence of the Imperials' massive [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] battlestation via Basso's information, Organa was assigned the mission to [[Battle of Toprawa|retrieve]] the Death Star plans from Rebels in the [[Toprawa system/Legends|Toprawa system]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Battle of Kattada first appeared in the [[Empire 5|fifth]] and [[Empire 6|sixth]] issues of the [[Dark Horse Comics]] series ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]''. Released in [[2003]], the two issues formed the story arc [[Star Wars: Empire: Princess... Warrior|''Princess... Warrior'']], written by [[Randy Stradley]] and illustrated by [[Davidé Fabbri]], [[Christian Dalla Vecchia]], and [[Digital Chameleon]]. [[2004]]'s ''[[Ultimate Missions: Rebel Storm|Star Wars Miniatures: Ultimate Missions: Rebel Storm]]'' by [[J.D. Wiker]] contained instructions for a game scenario of the Battle of Kattada that could be played with [[Rebel Storm (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Rebel Storm'']] characters. In the game scenario, the players take control of the Imperials and the Rebels at the [[Time/Legends|time]] the two forces are in a standoff. If the Imperial player kills Organa or manages to repair their [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitter]] and call for help, he or she wins, while the Rebel player wins if the majority of the Imperials are defeated, or if none of the ''Tantive IV''{{'s}} crew attacks and at least one of the Kattadans survive the fighting. In [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', the battle was identified for the first time as the Battle of Kattada in the entry for Basso. The battle was later referenced in [[2009]]'s ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]]. ==Appearances== *[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] {{1st}} *[[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]] ==Sources== *''[[Ultimate Missions: Rebel Storm]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Panel to Panel Volume 2: Expanding the Universe]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Battle of Kattada}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{1stID|firefight on Kattada}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Skyhook}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Kattada }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kattada, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Kattada]] [[Category:Battles of Operation Skyhook]]
